strengths: 19+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with demonstrated mastery in testing, architecture, and DevOps
Founding GISCollective (2016–present) shows entrepreneurial drive and ability to build products solving real problems for NGOs and professionals
Engineering leadership through organizing Refactoring Dojos, Code Katas, workshops, and mentoring—demonstrates ability to inspire and elevate others
concerns: AI expertise limited to 2 months at current role (April 2025); no prior AI/ML projects, no AI degree, no demonstrated AI products or platforms—critical gap for an 'AI Strategy' principal role
No evidence of identifying strategic differentiation opportunities, advising customers on AI adoption, or developing cloud/AI platform vision—core responsibilities of this role
Staff-level individual contributor track record, but no clear enterprise-scale principal or director-level impact directing technical strategy across organizations
response.justification: Bogdan brings 19+ years of solid software engineering with strong discipline in testing, architecture, and multiple technical domains. His founding of GISCollective and community mentoring demonstrate leadership capacity. However, this role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' as a preferred qualification, and his AI experience is limited to 2 months at his current position with no prior AI/ML work, educational background, or strategic AI projects. While his technical foundation is strong, the AI Strategy focus of this principal role requires deeper and longer AI expertise than his resume demonstrates.
